topics.name: Present simple
topics.when_en: To describe who or what something IS right now. States, identities, feelings.
topics.when_es: Para describir cómo es algo en este momento: estados, identidades, sentimientos.
topics.extra: Contractions: I am → I'm · He is → He's · They are → They're · is not → isn't · are not → aren't

topics.name: Present continuous
topics.when_en: To describe something happening RIGHT NOW, at this moment.
topics.when_es: Para describir algo que está pasando AHORA MISMO, en este momento.
topics.extra: Structure: Subject + am/is/are + verb-ing · Negative: Subject + am/is/are not + verb-ing

topics.name: Past simple
topics.when_en: To describe how something WAS in the past. A finished state or situation.
topics.when_es: Para describir cómo era algo en el pasado. Un estado o situación ya terminado.
topics.extra: Contractions: was not → wasn't · were not → weren't

topics.name: Have to
topics.when_en: To express EXTERNAL obligation — rules, duties or requirements that come from outside.
topics.when_es: Para expresar obligación EXTERNA — reglas, deberes o requisitos que vienen de fuera.
topics.extra: Contractions: do not → don't · does not → doesn't · Negative means NO OBLIGATION — it is not necessary, but it is allowed.

topics.name: Must
topics.when_en: To express INTERNAL obligation or strong necessity — something the speaker believes is very important.
topics.when_es: Para expresar obligación INTERNA o necesidad fuerte — algo que el hablante considera muy importante.
topics.extra: Contraction: must not → mustn't · IMPORTANT: must not = PROHIBITION (it is forbidden), very different from do not have to (not necessary).
